work_unit: engine-core/autonomous-loop.sh: remove dead model-fallback branch + subshell state loss (audit-2026-07-04-016 H01)
situation: audit-2026-07-04-016 finding H01 (priority 1/7): autonomous-loop.sh L99-179 model fallback/probe logic is dead code under current config (PRIMARY=FALLBACK=qwen3.7-max, STICKY_FAIL_THRESHOLD=9999). Additionally, the outer while loop body runs in a subshell (...) for cwd isolation (AS-H-001 fix), so all state variable mutations (STICKY_FALLBACK/GLM_FAIL_STREAK/PROBE_COUNTDOWN) never propagate back to parent — sticky fallback was broken across iterations even if multi-model strategy were re-enabled.
action: Delete entire if/else fallback+probe branch (L148-179) and unused state variables (FALLBACK_MODEL/STICKY_FAIL_THRESHOLD/PROBE_EVERY/STICKY_FALLBACK/GLM_FAIL_STREAK/PROBE_COUNTDOWN). Replace with single `run_round "$PRIMARY_MODEL" || true` call. Add comment documenting restoration path (move state out of subshell or externalize to .model-state.json) for future multi-model re-enablement.
outcome_evidence: bash -n syntax OK; git diff --stat shows -41/+10 net deletion; opt-worktree.sh committed + pushed to origin/auto/opt-autonomous-studio-shift-1783167421; no other files modified.
next_suggestion: 派生 audit-2026-07-04-016 H02 (watchdog.sh pgrep 误匹配，priority 2) — 同为 route-fix，改 watchdog.sh 的进程检测为 cwd 锚定或 pidfile。
